response.justification: While Bogdan is clearly an excellent full-stack software engineer with 14+ years of experience and strong fundamentals, his background is in web/backend development and software architecture, not hardware architecture or AI accelerator optimization. The role requires specialized expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and deep learning workload optimization—areas with no demonstrated experience on his resume. His recent AI-agent infrastructure work refers to agentic frameworks, not performance architecture for hardware.
strengths: Deep software engineering expertise with 14+ years across multiple roles and languages, meeting minimum experience requirements
Proven low-latency performance optimization experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of concurrent requests
Strong C/C++ and systems-level programming background from National Instruments and embedded systems work
concerns: No demonstrated experience with GPU architecture, SoC design, or IP modeling—core requirements for the role
Background is software generalist (full-stack, web, backend) rather than specialized hardware architect or performance engineer
No evidence of deep learning workload optimization, neural network training/inference analysis, or AI accelerator experience
